expectations.text: AI surfaces the S3-success / DB-write-failure partial failure scenario
expectations.evidence: AI asked: 'what happens if S3 upload succeeds but the database write or finalization step fails?' — drove pending-record lifecycle design.

expectations.text: AI asks about who can access whose files
expectations.evidence: AI directly asked: 'who is allowed to see which files in v1?' — owner-only constraint embedded in final prompt.

expectations.text: AI asks about file size and type limits
expectations.evidence: AI asked 'What file types and size limits do you actually need in v1?' — user confirmed 50MB, JPEG/PNG, PDF.

expectations.text: Generated prompt includes edge cases with the partial failure scenario as a concrete decision
expectations.evidence: Constraints in final_prompt.md mandate the pending-record lifecycle: create record first, verify S3, then finalize.

expectations.text: Generated prompt defines compartmentalized components with individual responsibilities
expectations.evidence: 5 components defined: Upload Initiation API, Client Upload Flow, Completion/Finalization API, Malware Scanning, File Access API.
